title: test trigger event creation and retrieval
description: Verify that the API endpoints for creating and retrieving trigger events function correctly, including validation of input data and performance with large datasets.

title: test rca creation update and status tracking
description: Ensure the API endpoints for managing Root Cause Analyses support creation, updates, and automatic status calculation based on required fields.

title: test corrective action plan management
description: Validate the API endpoints for managing corrective action plans linked to RCAs, including creation, updates, and audit trail recording.

title: test asset data handling
description: Check the API endpoints for handling asset data, ensuring correct CRUD operations and data integrity.

title: test taxonomy management endpoints
description: Test the API endpoints for managing system taxonomy such as categories and definitions, verifying data validation and consistency.

title: test database connection and initialization
description: Verify the database connection and initialization logic using sql.js, ensuring proper setup and backup functionality.
